data.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: RED tests verified. Added 8 test functions to test-dso-setup.sh (test_stamp_in_shim, test_stamp_in_config, test_stamp_in_precommit_yaml, test_stamp_in_ci_yaml, test_stamp_idempotent, test_gitignore_includes_cache, test_yaml_stamp_survives_roundtrip, test_validate_handles_stamped_config) and test_stamp_format_consistent to test-marketplace-json.sh. All stamp tests FAIL (RED): 8 failures in test-dso-setup.sh, 8 failures in test-marketplace-json.sh. Ready to implement. ✓
